title: Priests and Warriors Collide
description: Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Conis, Luffy. Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: ....Looks like we can use that vine.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Would you mind if I joined you?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Seeing such historical remains...makes me quite excited...

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: But didn't you say it was scary...?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: What was that? A shout of resolve?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: My, aren't you the brave one?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Hah....hah...!! sorry to be a bother...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I didn't go because I was scared...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: It's so cool to have such courage!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Someday, I want to have it, too...!!

summary: Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.
